memberdef.type: std::variant< std::vector< uint8_t >, std::vector< ushort_t >, std::vector< uint_t >, std::vector< uint64_t >, std::string >
memberdef.definition: using TiffDataVariant = std::variant<std::vector<uint8_t>, std::vector<ushort_t>, std::vector<uint_t>, std::vector<uint64_t>, std::string>
memberdef.name: TiffDataVariant

detaileddescription.para: Map the Tiff data type to the TiffDataVariant entries
Map the Tiff data type to the TiffDataVariant entries
Helper Function to make the variant's vector out of an initializer list

memberdef.argsstring: (const TiffDataType type, const std::initializer_list< uint64_t > values)
memberdef.name: make_variant

detaileddescription.para: Map the Tiff data type to the TiffDataVariant entries
Converts any uint64_t to the type required by the TiffTag
Converts any uint64_t to the type required by the TiffTag
Get the element size of the container
